name: normal
morph_traits: plain fur or smooth skin, no special features, neutral earth tones, simple round shapes
palette: warm beige, creamy white, soft tan, pale ivory, light brown
skin_material: smooth warm beige skin with soft ivory undertones and gentle tan gradients across the body
accent: light tan tail tip, warm brown eyes

name: fire
morph_traits: flame-tipped tail and ears, ember scales or magma-cracked skin, orange and red color palette, glowing eyes
palette: jet black, dark gray, bright orange lava glow, crimson red, amber
skin_material: lava-hardened black skin with bright orange molten lava visible through surface cracks all over the body

name: water
morph_traits: fins replacing ears and tail tip, smooth wet scales, blue and teal color palette, gill slits on neck
palette: ocean blue, seafoam white, deep teal, translucent aqua, silver foam
skin_material: smooth ocean-blue scales with seafoam white highlights and subtle teal undertones covering the entire body
accent: seafoam tail tip, deep ocean-blue eyes

name: electric
morph_traits: jagged lightning-bolt shaped tail and spines, yellow and white color palette, sparking fur tips, sharp angular features
palette: electric yellow, bright white lightning, pale gold, light gray, vivid amber
skin_material: bright yellow electrified skin with white lightning bolt patterns crackling across the entire surface
accent: golden yellow tail tip, glowing electric-white eyes

name: grass
morph_traits: leaf-shaped ears and tail, vine or petal growths on body, green color palette, floral patterns on skin
palette: forest green, lime green, earthy brown, pale yellow-green, mossy olive
skin_material: leafy forest green skin with lime green highlights and earthy brown texture patches across the body
accent: mossy green tail tip, bright leaf-green eyes

name: ice
morph_traits: crystalline ice spikes on back and tail, pale blue and white color palette, frosted fur, sharp angular icy features
palette: pale icy blue, frost white, crystalline silver, translucent blue, cool gray
skin_material: frost-coated pale blue skin with crystalline ice patterns covering the entire body surface
accent: icy tail tip, pale frost-white eyes

name: fighting
morph_traits: bulky muscular build, thick limbs, scarred or calloused skin, earthy red and brown tones, determined expression
palette: earthy red-brown, dark tan, deep sienna, sandy beige, warm ochre
skin_material: rough calloused earthy red-brown skin with dark tan battle-scarred patches and hardened hide texture
accent: dark tan tail tip, fierce deep brown eyes

name: poison
morph_traits: venomous fangs or stingers, purple and acid-green color palette, toxic slime coating, barbed tail
palette: deep purple, acid green, toxic yellow-green, dark violet, sickly pale green
skin_material: toxic purple skin with acid green slime oozing through the surface and dark violet bruise markings all over
accent: acid green tail tip, slitted toxic yellow-green eyes

name: ground
morph_traits: rocky plated hide, sandy brown color palette, clawed flat feet, earthen crystal growths, heavy stocky frame
palette: sandy brown, rocky gray, warm ochre, dusty beige, dark earth brown
skin_material: rocky plated sandy brown hide with rough gray stone texture and dusty ochre desert markings across the body
accent: sandy brown tail tip, stone gray eyes

name: flying
morph_traits: feathered wings replacing front limbs or on back, hollow light bones, sky blue and white color palette, streamlined body
palette: sky blue, cloud white, pale silver, light azure, soft cream
skin_material: smooth sky blue feathered skin with cloud white soft plumage covering the entire body surface
accent: cloud white tail tip, clear sky-blue eyes

name: psychic
morph_traits: glowing third eye on forehead, pink and lavender color palette, ethereal aura, enlarged smooth cranium
palette: vivid pink, pale lavender, soft white glow, deep rose, translucent magenta
skin_material: glowing pink psychic skin with pale lavender ethereal aura radiating outward and soft rose undertones
accent: rose-pink tail tip, glowing deep pink eyes

name: bug
morph_traits: chitinous exoskeleton plating, compound eyes, antenna on head, green and brown color palette, segmented limbs
palette: forest green, dark brown, chitinous black, pale yellow-green, amber
skin_material: hard chitinous green exoskeleton covering the body with dark brown joint segments and black edge outlines
accent: amber tail tip, compound amber eyes

name: rock
morph_traits: stone-encrusted shell or plating, grey and brown color palette, angular blocky features, crystal mineral growths
palette: granite gray, rocky brown, mineral white, dark slate, quartz crystal
skin_material: granite gray stone-encrusted skin with rocky brown rough mineral plating covering the entire body
accent: dark slate tail tip, cold stone-gray eyes

name: ghost
morph_traits: translucent wispy body edges, hollow black eye sockets, purple and black color palette, shadowy vapour trailing from tail
palette: pale lavender, translucent purple, silvery mist, dark violet, soft white glow
skin_material: semi-transparent ghostly pale lavender skin with faint shadowy internal outlines visible beneath the surface
accent: wispy tail tip, hollow violet glowing eye sockets

name: dragon
morph_traits: small wing membranes on back, horn or crest on head, scaled body, deep blue and purple color palette, slit pupils
palette: deep navy blue, dark purple, iridescent teal, bright cobalt, metallic gold
skin_material: dragon-scaled deep navy blue hide with dark purple scale edges and iridescent teal highlights across the body
accent: cobalt blue tail tip, slit-pupil gold dragon eyes

name: dark
morph_traits: shadowy dark fur, black and dark grey color palette, jagged spiky edges, menacing narrow eyes, tattered ear tips
palette: jet black, dark charcoal, shadowy navy, deep slate gray, void black
skin_material: shadow-dark jet black fur with deep charcoal jagged edge markings and void-black sharp spiky outlines
accent: jagged black tail tip, narrow menacing dark gray eyes

name: steel
morph_traits: metallic plated armour on torso and limbs, silver and gunmetal color palette, mechanical joint lines, reflective smooth surfaces
palette: silver gray, gunmetal dark, metallic white, cool steel blue, polished chrome
skin_material: metallic silver armored skin with gunmetal gray plating covering the body and polished chrome highlights
accent: chrome silver tail tip, reflective steel-gray eyes

name: fairy
morph_traits: small ornate wings, pastel pink and white color palette, glowing sparkles around body, round soft features, flower or star motifs
palette: pastel pink, soft white, glittering gold, pale rose, shimmering lavender
skin_material: pastel pink soft glowing skin with shimmering gold sparkles floating around the surface and pale rose glow
accent: soft pink tail tip, sparkling golden eyes
